name.description: Full name of the buyer submitting the sourcing inquiry.

country.description: Country or market where the buyer is located.

product_category.description: Product category or item the buyer wants to source.

order_quantity.description: Estimated order quantity or purchasing volume.

service_needed.description: Primary sourcing service requested by the buyer.

message.description: Project details, requirements, timelines, or questions from the buyer.

submitted_at.description: Timestamp when the inquiry was submitted.
